title: leptocoryphium lanatum
intro: Leptocoryphium lanatum, also known as the hairy-leaved leptocoryphium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae, native to tropical regions. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The plant is known to offer several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing skin irritations. Traditionally, it is prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal use, often combined with other herbs to enhance its effects.
